332.reason: [Error: When ch != '&&', the code still appends the second character to content and sets token to AND, which is incorrect. The token should remain as ERROR and the function should return immediately after reporting the error.]

317.reason:
[The condition `ch != EOF` is evaluated after `ch == '
'`, but if `ch` is EOF, `ch == '
'` is false, so the loop never exits on EOF. Also, EOF should terminate the comment and the loop. Moreover, after reading '
', `_lineno` should be incremented.]

reasons.buggy-claude-sonnet-4-6-1: 0.25 , reason:  logical error: condition should use || instead of &&; a newline character can never equal EOF, so EOF is never detected, causing an infinite loop when end-of-file is reached inside a single-line comment
